prompt: A surreal but realistic scene showing a single person standing in the center of a space, connected by only a few thin threads to others, while all surrounding people are densely interconnected with many thick, complex threads between them. The surrounding network appears rich and highly connected, while the central figure remains sparsely connected. The composition emphasizes imbalance and contradiction. Cinematic lighting, realistic environment, no text, no diagrams, no labels.
visual_logic: A central person has very few connections while surrounding individuals are highly interconnected, making others appear more socially connected despite being part of the same network.
